{{Quote|No one steals from Ikt and gets away with it!|Ikt|<ref name="SWG:ToOW">''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Trials of Obi-Wan]]''</ref>}}
'''Ikt''' was a [[Mustafarian/Legends|Mustafarian]] who explored the ruins of [[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar]].

During his exploration of some old ruins, he found a strange piece of crystal that appeared to have a snake-shaped flaw within it. He spent the night camped among the ruins, though was awoken by someone running away from him. He noticed that the crystal he found was gone.

Ikt visited the [[Mensix Mining Facility/Legends|Mensix Mining Facility]] and found a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] willing to hunt down his thief.

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Ikt appeared as a non-player character in the video game ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Star Wars video games|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] and published by [[LucasArts]], prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].
